MY NAME IS

NUGROHO IZZA

I'M A FRESH GRADUATE INFORMATICS ENGINEERING

VIEW MY EXPERIENCE

NUGROHO
IZZA

FRESH
GRADUATE

As a fresh graduate of the Informatics program at UPN "Veteran" Yogyakarta, I have a strong interest in full-stack application development and data analysis. I focus on building scalable, efficient systems and deriving actionable insights from data, prioritizing user needs and data-driven decision making. My approach is grounded in attention to detail, openness to exchanging ideas, and continuous improvement throughout both the development and analytical processes.
